events.label: assistant
events.text:
I've written the assessment to `/app/answer.json`.

**Decision: fail (high risk)** — The observed condition (foam installed where a fire-rated sealant is required, confirmed by color/label mismatch) is a material substitution that fails IRC R302.11 fireblocking requirements. General-purpose foam isn't a listed/approved fireblocking material and can't be relied on to resist fire/draft spread in concealed spaces.

Since the work is only rough-complete (not yet closed in), this is correctable now — actions call for halting close-out, removing the non-conforming foam, reinstalling approved fire-rated sealant per manufacturer listing, and re-inspecting before concealment.
